title: Replace image gallery photos with new facility images

requirements.summary: Replace the existing 12 facility photos in the ImageGallery component with the 6 uploaded images
acceptanceCriteria: The ImageGallery component displays the 6 new uploaded facility images
Old gallery images are removed from the component
The grid layout adjusts appropriately for 6 images instead of 12
Images maintain responsive behavior and hover effects
Modal dialog still functions for enlarged image views

file_operations.description: Update the image array to reference the 6 new facility images: enhanced_348s (7).jpg, enhanced_348s.jpg, enhanced_348s (8).jpg, enhanced_517620380_1306336444832099_8194069313658765999_n.jpg, enhanced_517940772_1306336431498767_8407149108597182872_n.jpg, and enhanced_518270242_1306336364832107_8264580889139094172_n.jpg. Remove all 12 old image references. Ensure the grid layout, hover effects, and modal dialog continue to function correctly with the reduced image count.
